hero.title: About CAD Gurukul
hero.subtitle: We believe every Class 8–12 student in India deserves clarity about their future — not confusion, not peer pressure.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Turning "What should I do after 10th?" into a confident answer.
mission.body: CAD Gurukul uses advanced AI assessments to analyse a student's aptitude, personality, interests, and learning style — and matches them to careers that truly fit. We pair AI intelligence with deep knowledge of Indian education systems so students and parents get guidance that actually makes sense.

items.title: Student-First
items.desc: Every feature is built around what a student in Class 10–12 actually needs, not what looks impressive.

items.title: AI with Intent
items.desc: We use AI not to replace human guidance, but to make personalised guidance accessible to every student across India.

items.title: Made for Bharat
items.desc: Designed for Indian boards, Indian careers, Indian family dynamics. No generic Western templates.

items.title: Privacy by Default
items.desc: Your answers and profile are never shared. Your career data is yours — always.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Educators, engineers, and AI researchers — united by one goal.

hero.title: How CAD Gurukul Works
hero.subtitle: From signup to your personalised career report — here's exactly what happens at each step.

steps.title: Create Your Profile
steps.desc: Register and complete a quick 5-step onboarding wizard. Tell us your class, board, interests, subjects, and goals. It takes less than 5 minutes.
steps.detail: We collect academic details, hobby tags, preferred learning style, and parental background to give the AI strong context before your assessment even starts.

steps.title: Take the AI Assessment
steps.desc: Answer 10–30 adaptive AI-generated questions tailored to your profile. Questions span aptitude, personality, interest, logic, and creativity.
steps.detail: Our AI adapts based on your previous answers — if you show strong logical reasoning, it digs deeper. Questions are generated fresh for every student.

steps.title: AI Analyses Your Results
steps.desc: Once you submit, our AI evaluates all answers across 9 dimensions including STEM vs Non-STEM, Social Orientation, Creative Inclination, and more.
steps.detail: We use Google Gemini 1.5 Pro for evaluation and score computation, and GPT-4o for premium report writing — giving you the best of both AI worlds.

steps.title: Receive Your Career Report
steps.desc: Get matched to 3–15+ careers with fit scores. See recommended stream, subjects, exam pathways, and step-by-step roadmaps for each career.
steps.detail: Premium users also get parent guidance, college recommendations, entrance exam timelines, and a beautifully formatted downloadable PDF.

items.q: Is this for Class 8, 9, 10, 11, or 12 students?
items.a: Yes — all five. We tailor the report to your stage. Class 8 & 9 students get early interest and aptitude mapping; Class 10 students get stream selection guidance; Class 11/12 get subject and career deepening.

items.q: How is this different from generic career tests?
items.a: Most tests give you a fixed list of careers without reasoning. CAD Gurukul uses live AI that understands your specific answers and generates a personalised, contextual report — not a template.

items.q: What does the free report include?
items.a: Top 3 career matches, a stream recommendation, and a personality overview. It's genuinely useful — not a teaser.

items.q: What does the premium report include?
items.a: 15+ careers, full scoring across 9 aptitude categories, roadmap for each career, parent guidance, college suggestions, entrance exam timeline, and a PDF to share.

items.q: How long does the assessment take?
items.a: Free: 8–12 minutes. Premium: 20–30 minutes. You can pause and resume.
Yes — you can register as a parent and start an assessment on behalf of your child. The onboarding collects child details.

q1.text: Even after a long day, which activity makes you feel energized?

options.b: Creating something — art, music, or writing
options.c: Talking to people, leading or making plans
options.d: Learning how things work through experiments

q2.text: When you imagine your future, which dream feels most like yours?

options.a: Being a top professional (Doctor, Engineer, CA)
options.b: Starting or running my own business
options.c: Serving the nation — government, law, or social work
options.d: Creating impact through design, content, or innovation

q3.text: Which school subject do you secretly enjoy the most?

options.a: Maths or Science — numbers and logic excite me
options.b: Commerce or Economics — I think about money and business
options.c: History, Civics, or Geography — society fascinates me
options.d: Arts, Literature, or Languages — expression is my thing
